title: Updates to the 2020 product monograph guidance and master template: Closed consultation - Canada.ca
content:
## Updates to the 2020 product monograph guidance and master template: Closed consultation

## Current status: Closed
This consultation ran from September 15, 2023, to November 13, 2023.
Health Canada has revised the 2020 product monograph guidance and master template used by drug manufacturers. The updated draft guidance provides more information and guidance on preparing a product monograph for our review and approval.

## Who was the focus of this consultation
- healthcare providers

## Key questions for discussion
Health Canada looked for input and ideas on:
- making the guidance instructions clearer
- adding technical and policy information
We are using the feedback from this consultation to help us finalize the updated guidance on product monographs and the master template. When the final documents are published, the updated information within these 2 documents will only apply to product monographs that are submitted after final publication.
Bureau of Policy, Science and International Programs Pharmaceutical Drugs Directorate Health Canada
E-mail: bpsip-bpspiconsultation@hc-sc.gc.ca
